nasb.text: Fields will be bought in this land of which you say, “It is a desolation, without man or beast; it is given into the hand of the Chaldeans.”

esv.text: Fields shall be bought in this land of which you are saying, ‘It is a desolation, without man or beast; it is given into the hand of the Chaldeans.’

cnv.text: 你們說：“這地荒涼，沒有人煙，也沒有牲畜，是交在迦勒底人手中的。”但將來在這地上，必有人買賣田地。

ccb.text: 耶利米啊，你们说这地方落在了迦勒底人手中，变得一片荒凉，人兽绝迹。但将来这地方必再有人置买田产。
